items.title_en: Best Buy names Jason Bonfig as new CEO, replacing Corie Barry in late October
items.title_zh: 百思买于 10 月底任命 Jason Bonfig 为新任首席执行官，接替 Corie Barry
items.desc_en: The leadership change comes as the company tries to rev up sales and capitalize on artificial intelligence-fueled innovation of laptops and mobile phones.
items.desc_zh: 此次领导层变动之际，该公司正试图提高销售额并利用人工智能推动的笔记本电脑和手机创新。

items.title_en: Mortgage rates sink again, and home buyers jump back in
items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率再次下降，购房者重新涌入
items.desc_en: Mortgage demand continues to rebound as rates sink slightly lower.
items.desc_zh: 随着利率小幅下降，抵押贷款需求继续反弹。

items.title_en: Warren presses Trump administration for answers on evacuation of Americans amid Iran war

items.desc_en: Thousands of Americans were stuck in the Middle East at the start of the Iran war; some said they did not receive support they needed from the U.S. government.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗战争开始时，数千名美国人被困在中东；一些人表示，他们没有从美国政府获得所需的支持。

items.title_en: Jet fuel crisis: The airlines hit hardest by the supply squeeze as summer looms
items.title_zh: 航空燃油危机：夏季临近，航空公司受到供应紧张的打击最严重
items.desc_en: Europe's airlines began the year reasonably well-protected, but analysts warn jet fuel hedges are now "thinning fast".
items.desc_zh: 欧洲航空公司今年年初受到了相当良好的保护，但分析师警告说，航空燃油对冲现在正在“迅速减少”。

items.title_en: AT&T adds more wireless subscribers than expected as bundling pays off
items.title_zh: AT&T 增加的无线用户数量超出预期，捆绑销售带来回报

items.desc_zh: 受益于捆绑无线和高速光纤服务的套餐，AT&T 第一季度获得的无线用户数量超出预期。

items.title_en: Lufthansa cuts 20,000 summer flights as fuel prices surge
items.title_zh: 由于燃油价格飙升，汉莎航空削减了 20,000 个夏季航班
items.desc_en: The airline is the latest to cut flights as the US-Israel war with Iran sends jet fuel prices soaring.
items.desc_zh: 由于美以与伊朗的战争导致航空燃油价格飙升，该航空公司是最新一家削减航班的航空公司。

items.title_en: EU decides on key €90bn Ukraine loan after pipeline deadlock ends

items.desc_en: The funding was agreed last December, but it has been held up in a row over Russian oil supplies to Hungary.
items.desc_zh: 这笔资金是去年12月达成的，但由于俄罗斯向匈牙利供应石油而被搁置。

items.title_en: From Epstein to sock puppets: Key takeaways from Kevin Warsh's Fed confirmation hearing
items.title_zh: 从爱泼斯坦到傀儡：凯文·沃什美联储确认听证会的主要要点
items.desc_en: He denied making a deal with Donald Trump on interest rates and backed "policy regime change" at the central bank.
items.desc_zh: 他否认与唐纳德·特朗普就利率问题达成协议，并支持央行“政策体制变革”。

items.title_en: Amazon launches GLP-1 weight loss program, promising 'fast, convenient' access
items.title_zh: 亚马逊推出GLP-1减肥计划，承诺“快速、便捷”
items.desc_en: Through Amazon Pharmacy, patients will be able to access medications including Novo Nordisk's Wegovy as well as newer oral GLP-1 options.
items.desc_zh: 通过亚马逊药房，患者将能够获得药物，包括诺和诺德的 Wegovy 以及更新的口服 GLP-1 选择。

items.title_en: Iran sees mass redundancies from war with US and Israel
items.title_zh: 伊朗因与美国和以色列的战争而大规模裁员
items.desc_en: The impact is being felt by manufacturers, retailers and the digital sector, amid warnings it could get worse if the war resumes.
items.desc_zh: 制造商、零售商和数字行业都感受到了这种影响，并警告称，如果战争重新爆发，情况可能会变得更糟。

items.title_en: Israeli soldiers punished over vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
items.title_zh: 以色列士兵因在黎巴嫩破坏耶稣雕像而受到惩罚
items.desc_en: Two soldiers will be removed from combat duty and receive 30 days of military detention, Israel's military says.
items.desc_zh: 以色列军方表示，两名士兵将被解除战斗职责并接受 30 天的军事拘留。

items.title_en: Ofcom investigating Telegram over child sexual abuse material concerns
items.title_zh: Ofcom 就儿童性虐待材料问题对 Telegram 进行调查
items.desc_en: The popular messaging service told the BBC in a statement it "categorically denies Ofcom's accusations".
items.desc_zh: 这家受欢迎的消息服务公司在一份声明中告诉英国广播公司，它“断然否认 Ofcom 的指控”。

items.title_en: How will Apple change under 'product guy' John Ternus?
items.title_zh: 在“产品人”约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 的领导下，苹果将如何改变？
items.desc_en: As Tim Cook announces his departure from the top job at Apple, these are the key challenges for new boss John Ternus.
items.desc_zh: 随着蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 宣布辞去苹果公司最高职位，这些都是新任老板约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 面临的主要挑战。

items.title_en: Tinder and Zoom offer 'proof of humanity' eye-scans to combat AI
items.title_zh: Tinder 和 Zoom 提供“人性证明”眼部扫描来对抗人工智能
items.desc_en: The tech aims to identify people's irises and stop the rise of fake accounts and malicious scams.
items.desc_zh: 该技术旨在识别人们的虹膜并阻止虚假账户和恶意诈骗的兴起。

items.desc_zh: 该公司声称人工智能工具可以在某些黑客和网络安全任务上超越人类，这引发了金融界的担忧。
